## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between Prophecy and GrowthX teams to discuss content performance, strategy, and upcoming tasks.](https://fathom.video/share/xzCeUYtNrtzSz5F1j4_RjVxas3EGnmfB?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Content performance metrics show positive trends, with all-time highs in impressions and clicks](https://fathom.video/share/xzCeUYtNrtzSz5F1j4_RjVxas3EGnmfB?tab=summary&timestamp=21.0)
  - [LLM referral traffic is increasing, indicating good traction in AI-driven searches](https://fathom.video/share/xzCeUYtNrtzSz5F1j4_RjVxas3EGnmfB?tab=summary&timestamp=371.0)
  - [Team is refining ICP targeting strategy, focusing on data platform leaders rather than individual data engineers](https://fathom.video/share/xzCeUYtNrtzSz5F1j4_RjVxas3EGnmfB?tab=summary&timestamp=1412.0)
  - [Content quality and alignment with feedback is improving week-over-week](https://fathom.video/share/xzCeUYtNrtzSz5F1j4_RjVxas3EGnmfB?tab=summary&timestamp=1791.0)

## Topics

### Content Performance Update

  - [7 articles delivered for review and published last week](https://fathom.video/share/xzCeUYtNrtzSz5F1j4_RjVxas3EGnmfB?tab=summary&timestamp=196.0)
  - [6 articles in progress for this week, including 1 refresh](https://fathom.video/share/xzCeUYtNrtzSz5F1j4_RjVxas3EGnmfB?tab=summary&timestamp=211.0)
  - [Search Console and Google Analytics showing all-time highs in impressions and clicks](https://fathom.video/share/xzCeUYtNrtzSz5F1j4_RjVxas3EGnmfB?tab=summary&timestamp=251.0)
  - ["Data Engineering Skills" article performing exceptionally well](https://fathom.video/share/xzCeUYtNrtzSz5F1j4_RjVxas3EGnmfB?tab=summary&timestamp=280.0)
  - [Non-branded impressions (NBI) for articles averaging 56%, above the 50% benchmark](https://fathom.video/share/xzCeUYtNrtzSz5F1j4_RjVxas3EGnmfB?tab=summary&timestamp=726.0)

### LLM and Referral Traffic

  - [LLM referral traffic saw a notable increase](https://fathom.video/share/xzCeUYtNrtzSz5F1j4_RjVxas3EGnmfB?tab=summary&timestamp=371.0)
  - [Team considering methods to track LLM search queries, possibly through repeated pinging](https://fathom.video/share/xzCeUYtNrtzSz5F1j4_RjVxas3EGnmfB?tab=summary&timestamp=452.0)
  - [Optimization for LLMs follows general SEO principles, with a focus on definitive, information-based content](https://fathom.video/share/xzCeUYtNrtzSz5F1j4_RjVxas3EGnmfB?tab=summary&timestamp=501.0)

### Keyword Performance and Analysis

  - [Google Search Console data showing some inconsistencies (e.g., good positions but zero clicks)](https://fathom.video/share/xzCeUYtNrtzSz5F1j4_RjVxas3EGnmfB?tab=summary&timestamp=693.0)
  - [Team discussing ways to better analyze and prioritize keywords, potentially developing an aggregate score system](https://fathom.video/share/xzCeUYtNrtzSz5F1j4_RjVxas3EGnmfB?tab=summary&timestamp=830.0)
  - [Focus on relevance and alignment with Prophecy's desired conversations and positioning](https://fathom.video/share/xzCeUYtNrtzSz5F1j4_RjVxas3EGnmfB?tab=summary&timestamp=1561.0)

### Traffic Growth and Analysis

  - [GA4 data shows a doubling of baseline traffic over the past three quarters](https://fathom.video/share/xzCeUYtNrtzSz5F1j4_RjVxas3EGnmfB?tab=summary&timestamp=1084.0)
  - [Team working on categorizing content by pillars for easier analysis in Looker](https://fathom.video/share/xzCeUYtNrtzSz5F1j4_RjVxas3EGnmfB?tab=summary&timestamp=1174.0)

### ICP and Content Strategy

  - [Shifting focus from individual data engineers to central data platform team leaders](https://fathom.video/share/xzCeUYtNrtzSz5F1j4_RjVxas3EGnmfB?tab=summary&timestamp=1403.0)
  - [Exploring resources and communities where the ICP (Ideal Customer Profile) engages](https://fathom.video/share/xzCeUYtNrtzSz5F1j4_RjVxas3EGnmfB?tab=summary&timestamp=1309.0)
  - [Emphasis on creating content that speaks the language of data leadership, which can resonate across all data roles](https://fathom.video/share/xzCeUYtNrtzSz5F1j4_RjVxas3EGnmfB?tab=summary&timestamp=1702.0)

### Content Quality Improvement

  - [Positive feedback on content quality, with fewer line edits needed in recent reviews](https://fathom.video/share/xzCeUYtNrtzSz5F1j4_RjVxas3EGnmfB?tab=summary&timestamp=1771.0)
  - [Team demonstrating consistent improvement and incorporation of feedback](https://fathom.video/share/xzCeUYtNrtzSz5F1j4_RjVxas3EGnmfB?tab=summary&timestamp=1791.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Develop a list of publications and communities where Prophecy's ICP (central data platform team leaders) engages](https://fathom.video/share/xzCeUYtNrtzSz5F1j4_RjVxas3EGnmfB?tab=summary&timestamp=1309.0)
  - [Explore options for tracking conversions to ebook downloads through GA4 event setup](https://fathom.video/share/xzCeUYtNrtzSz5F1j4_RjVxas3EGnmfB?tab=summary&timestamp=1025.0)
  - [Create a summary of data analysis questions and goals for future meetings](https://fathom.video/share/xzCeUYtNrtzSz5F1j4_RjVxas3EGnmfB?tab=summary&timestamp=1695.0)
  - [Continue refining content strategy to target data leadership language and concerns](https://fathom.video/share/xzCeUYtNrtzSz5F1j4_RjVxas3EGnmfB?tab=summary&timestamp=1702.0)
  - [Work on the upcoming e-book project alongside regular article deliveries](https://fathom.video/share/xzCeUYtNrtzSz5F1j4_RjVxas3EGnmfB?tab=summary&timestamp=1222.0)
